name: Volt Draft
additional_info: This has a proc window of 5 seconds after using Inhale. Storm Strikes from this Talent deal 0.125 * (Thundercall + Galebreathe investment) Thundercall damage, capping at 25 damage with 100 points invested in both Attunements. Can proc Grounding Bolt.
desc: Using Inhale will now also make your Basic Attacks apply a storm strike. [20 second CD]
